title: Stir Fry with Australian Long Beans
description: A simple and flavorful stir fry recipe featuring australian long beans and a variety of other ingredients.

ingredients.name: Crisp Fermented Bean Paste
ingredients.notes: available at most Asian grocery stores

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and stir-fry until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Add the australian long beans to the wok and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes, or until they start to soften.
Add the crisp fermented bean paste and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes, until the beans are tender.
Add the soy sauce (if using) and stir-fry for 1 minute, until the sauce has thickened.
Season the stir fry with salt to taste.
